name: slope-web Roadmap
description: Roadmap for getslope.dev — the marketing site, documentation, and interactive guide for SLOPE. Sprint numbering is independent from the main slope repo.

phases.name: Phase 1 — Foundation & Content
phases.note: Initial guide page + v1.45.0 content refresh. Shipped 2026-03-27.

phases.name: Phase 2 — Guide Polish & Mobile
phases.note: Layout fixes, typing animation, state persistence, 10 branch conversations. S4-5 (diff view) deferred. Shipped 2026-03-27.

phases.name: Phase 3 — Site Refresh
phases.note: Problem section 4th card, BigPicture workflow gates, GettingStarted workflow mention. 4 new doc sections (sessions, model routing, PR reviews, guard audit). Shipped 2026-03-27.

phases.name: Phase 4 — SEO & Discoverability
phases.note: Robots.txt fix, SoftwareApplication schema, BreadcrumbList, improved page descriptions. Shipped 2026-04-04.

phases.name: Phase 5 — Conversion & Signals
phases.note: Informed by Dunford (positioning), Hormozi (offer/CTA), Rachitsky (growth), Fishkin (SEO/GEO) reviews.

sprints.note: 3-panel IAE layout (file tree | chat | artifact preview), scripted 6-step tour covering full sprint lifecycle, 3 branch stubs, JSON syntax highlighting, mobile inline artifacts. Known bugs: artifact panel not scrollable, continue button not sticky, mobile layout broken.

tickets.title: Tour data model — types, 6 steps, artifacts, branches, buildFileTree()
Guide page template — 3-panel IAE with pre-rendered hidden DOM
Client-side engine — state machine, step advancement, branch nav, artifact preview
Nav + sitemap + CSS — guide link, guide-specific styles, sitemap fix

sprints.note: Manifest sync + 4 new doc sections + Hero/About messaging + HowItRuns scenario replacements. Reviewed by subagent for accuracy.

tickets.title: Hero + About page messaging — workflow orchestration, six layers, multi-repo/teams cards
4 new doc sections — WorkflowEngine, BatchExecution, MultiRepoOrg, ContextCompression
Wire into docs.astro — imports, sidebar links, component renders in correct groups
HowItRuns — replace Research + Code Audit with Workflow Run + Org Status

sprints.theme: The Fix — Guide Layout & Mobile Overhaul

tickets.title: Fix artifact preview panel — add independent scroll, constrain height within IAE grid
Sticky continue button — make input area fixed to bottom of chat panel
Mobile layout overhaul — fix file tree overlay, hide desktop panels, constrain code blocks
Full responsive QA — test all 6 steps + branches on mobile, tablet, desktop breakpoints

sprints.theme: The Deep Dive — Guide v2 Interactivity
sprints.note: S4-5 (artifact diff view) deferred — no repeated artifacts to diff yet.

tickets.title: Deeper branch content — full side-conversations for guards, scoring, handicap math, harness setup
Typing animation — character-by-character agent response reveal with GSAP timeline
Jump-to navigation — phase indicator clicks scroll to step, unlock-based gating
State persistence — localStorage save/restore of progress, returning user resume
Artifact diff view — show file changes between steps (e.g., handicap card before/after)

sprints.theme: The Showcase — Home Page & Getting Started Refresh

tickets.title: GettingStarted section — add workflow setup step, mention slope sprint run
Problem section — add team coordination angle, context window challenges
BigPicture diagram — add workflow gates and plan review to lifecycle flow
Proof section — update sample anecdote, refresh hardcoded initial values if stats changed
Session Management doc section — slope session dashboard/handoff/assign/plan
Smart Model Routing doc section — cost-adjusted selection, forceApi, selectModel hierarchy
Subagent PR Reviews doc section — slope review run, isolated review prompts
Guard Audit & Metrics doc section — slope guard audit/metrics/recommend
Fix robots.txt domain — slope.dev → getslope.dev for sitemap discovery
Add SoftwareApplication structured data — name, version, offers:free, repo URL
Add BreadcrumbList schema to docs page — sidebar hierarchy as breadcrumbs
Per-page OG descriptions — differentiate social previews for /guide and /docs

sprints.note: Informed by Dunford positioning audit, Hormozi value equation, Rachitsky activation analysis.

tickets.title: Rewrite hero subtitle — outcome-first, not feature list. Make guide a primary CTA.
Fix canonical positioning phrase — consistent across all pages, Base.astro default title
Add cost-of-delay, risk reversal, and time-to-value language to GettingStarted + CTA
Promote Sprint 12 anecdote to visual callout in Proof section. Move 'Retrospectives with data' to home page.

sprints.theme: The Signal — Structured Data & AI Citability

tickets.title: Add FAQPage schema to homepage + HowTo schema to GettingStarted
Add sameAs to Organization schema + AI crawler directives to robots.txt
Create /methodology page — scoring system explainer optimized for AI citation
Fix Base.astro default title to canonical phrase, drop backronym from primary surfaces
